title: Why was the first tunnel not completed?

meanings.usage: 指在地下或山中开凿的通道
指设计或建造机器、建筑物等专业人员
指高出地面的平面结构，或火车站的站台
指空气流通的装置或过程
指排出烟气或气体的垂直管道
指两个同样部分的，用于强调数量或尺寸
指武装力量进入他国领土的行为
指以官方或正式的方式进行
指出于某种目的提出想法或计划
指找到问题或困难的处理方法
指使两事物相连或有关联
指对危险或不好的事物感到害怕
指为某目的进行准备或组织

examples.en: A better plan was put forward by an Englishman.
examples.zh: 一个更好的计划由一位英国人提出。

examples.en: This platform would serve as a port and a railway station.
examples.zh: 这个平台将作为港口和火车站使用。

examples.en: This would solve the problem of ventilation.
It would draw in fresh air behind it.
examples.zh: 它会在身后吸入新鲜空气。

examples.en: If, at the time, the British had not feared invasion...
examples.zh: 如果当时英国人不害怕入侵的话...

examples.en: The world had to wait almost another 100 years.
examples.zh: 世界不得不再等将近100年。

examples.en: Finally connecting Britain to the European continent.
examples.zh: 最终把英国和欧洲大陆连接起来。

grammar.title: Third Conditional (虚拟语气过去完成时)
grammar.definition: 表示与过去事实相反的假设，结构为If + 主语 + had + 过去分词, 主语 + would/could/might + have + 过去分词
grammar.structure: If + 主语 + had + 过去分词..., 主语 + would/could/might + have + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于谈论与过去事实相反的假设情况，表达一种假想的、与事实不符的情景

examples.en: If, at the time, the British had not feared invasion, it would have been completed.
examples.zh: 如果当时英国人不害怕入侵，隧道早就建成了。

examples.en: If he had studied harder, he would have passed the exam.
examples.zh: 如果他当时学习更努力，他就能通过考试了。

grammar.title: Passive Voice - Past Simple Passive (一般过去时的被动语态)
grammar.definition: 当句子的主语是动作的承受者时，使用被动语态。结构为：主语 + be动词 + 过去分词
grammar.structure: 主语 + was/were + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于强调动作的承受者，或当动作执行者不明确/不重要时

examples.en: A tunnel was actually begun forty-two years later.
It was officially opened on March 7, 1994.

sentencePatterns.pattern: If + 过去完成时, 主语 + would have + 过去分词

original.en: If, at the time, the British had not feared invasion, it would have been completed.
original.zh: 如果当时英国人不害怕入侵，隧道早就建成了。

imitations.en: If I had known about the traffic, I would have left earlier.
imitations.zh: 如果我知道交通状况，我就会早点出发了。

imitations.en: If she had practiced more, she would have won the competition.
imitations.zh: 如果她多练习，她就能赢得比赛了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + would be possible to + 动词原形

original.en: He said that it would be possible to build a platform in the centre of the Channel.
original.zh: 他说在英吉利海峡中部建造一个平台是可能的。

imitations.en: It would be possible to finish the project by next month.
imitations.zh: 下个月完成这个项目是可能的。

imitations.en: It would be possible to travel to Mars in the future.
imitations.zh: 将来有可能去火星旅行。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be + 过去分词 + 时间/地点

original.en: It was officially opened on March 7, 1994.

imitations.en: The new school was opened last September.
